evals.name: fresh-repo-cold-start
evals.prompt: I just cloned a fresh repo and I want to start using project-harness here. There's no PROJECTS.md, no AGENTS.md, no CLAUDE.md. Walk me through getting set up.
evals.expected_output: Skill runs the four-step bootstrap end-to-end: (1) offers to scaffold PROJECTS.md from templates, (2) offers to write the standard project-harness pointer block to a new AGENTS.md and a new CLAUDE.md, (3) asks the planning-system question and persists the answer to .project-harness/project-harness.config.json, (4) nudges about the **References** block convention without backfilling. Each step gates on [y/n]. The config file ends up with init_done: true and all step markers true.

evals.name: stale-agents-md-only
evals.prompt: I'm starting a new project P12 in this repo. Where's the trunk?
evals.expected_output: Skill detects the existing PROJECTS.md (skips step 1), notices that AGENTS.md is missing OR doesn't contain 'project-harness' (fires step 2's nudge for AGENTS.md only), respects the existing CLAUDE.md if it already mentions project-harness (skips CLAUDE.md sub-step), persists the new agents_md_done marker. Then orients the user toward project-next or project-add for the actual P12 work. Does not re-prompt for planning-system if config already has it set.

files.content:
# Projects

## Project index

- [x] **P10** — Auth foundation → projects/P10-auth-foundation.md
- [~] **P11** — Rate limiting → projects/P11-rate-limiting.md

# Project notes

This repo uses project-harness — see SKILL files for routing.

evals.name: fully-bootstrapped-no-op
evals.prompt: What's next on the roadmap? I want to pick something to work on.
evals.expected_output: Skill reads the config file, sees init_done: true, skips the entire bootstrap silently, and routes immediately to project-next (or summarizes the orientation table and suggests project-next). No bootstrap prompts appear. The skill is effectively a one-line read in this case.
